name: archive-enabled-not-moving
description: Archive active but MFA hasn't processed — items stuck in primary

commands.command: Get-Mailbox -Identity jane.smith@contoso.com | Format-List ArchiveStatus, ArchiveState, RetentionPolicy, AutoExpandingArchiveEnabled
commands.output:
ArchiveStatus             : Active
ArchiveState              : Local
RetentionPolicy           : Default MRM Policy
AutoExpandingArchiveEnabled : False

DisplayName       : In-Place Archive - Jane Smith
ItemCount         : 12
TotalItemSize     : 45.2 MB (47,396,352 bytes)

Name: Default 2 year move to archive
RetentionAction: MoveToArchive
AgeLimitForRetention: 730.00:00:00
RetentionEnabled: True
Type: All

Name: Personal 1 year move to archive
RetentionAction: MoveToArchive
AgeLimitForRetention: 365.00:00:00
RetentionEnabled: True
Type: Personal
